steps.title: Create a worker-hosted feature-branch worktree from the current upstream base branch tip
Merge any additionally required upstream into the worker-hosted feature-branch worktree
Connect through a persistent SSH session into the worker instance
Verify the active mutable checkout is the EC2 swarm worker worktree rather than a manager-hosted surface
Run `bun install` in the worker-hosted feature-branch worktree before any code changes
Run the required pre-change build verification in the worker-hosted feature-branch worktree
Start the worker-local preview or runtime surface needed for the intended verification path
Open the intended verification surface in `agent-browser`; if no UI changes are expected, open Agent Chat
Capture a pre-change screenshot of the UI that will be updated, or capture Agent Chat if no UI changes are expected
Summarize what the pre-change screenshot shows
Is the worker preflight verification healthy?

decision.prompt: Is the worker preflight verification healthy?
